basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Guest Faculty (Biochemistry) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced through the Panjab University Guest Faculty (Biochemistry) Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Degree in Biochemistry or allied subject with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST), NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC norms, Ph.D. in Biochemistry or allied fields (desirable)
qualification.details: M.Sc. Degree in Biochemistry or allied subject with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST) or equivalent. NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC norms. Ph.D. in Biochemistry or allied fields is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1500/- per lecture with an upper limit of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

all_official_links.label: Download Panjab University Guest Faculty (Biochemistry) Job 2026 Notification PD

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Guest Faculty (Biochemistry).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Guest Faculty (Biochemistry) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required educational qualification?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. Degree in Biochemistry or an allied subject with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST), NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC norms. A Ph.D. in Biochemistry or allied fields is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 1500/- per lecture with an upper limit of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to take place?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to take place at Panjab University, Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
